title: asarca gayana
side_effects: Asarca gayana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high levels of toxic compounds like cardenolides and bufadienolides. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to cardiac issues, such as irregular heartbeat, palpitations, and even cardiac arrest. In severe cases, improper use of Asarca gayana can cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and wheezing, as the toxic compounds can affect the lungs and airways. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
